mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NUM > ( SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NUM)-10 FROM TB_NOTICE ) AND NOTICE_NUM <= ( SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NUM) FROM TB_NOTICE ) ORDER BY NOTICE_NUM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE VALUES ( NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContents}, #{noticeWriter}, sysdate, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET NOTICE_TITLE=#{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENTS=#{noticeContents}, NOTICE_WRITER=#{noticeWriter}, CREATED_AT=sysdate, VIEW_COUNT=0 WHERE NOTICE_NUM=#{noticeNum}
